text: Hey, good morning. James here from Nova Healthcare, Illinois. I'm calling to let you know about a cashback benefit that may help with out-of-pocket expenses of up to 10,000 dollars, especially during hospital care. So, to check your eligibility, can you please share your age? Sorry, could you please repeat how old you are? I think I missed that. Do you speak English? I apologize. We only have English speaking staff available right now. Thank you.
